Document:
# Crafting
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Crafting"/]
## Crafting
Here you can find instructions and guides for crafting various materials, blueprints, drinks, and more.
[bold]Category[/bold] [bold]Description[/bold] [textlink="[bold]Bartending[/bold]" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Bartending"/] All drink reagents: water, teas, Nuka-Cola, alcohol, and other consumable liquids. [textlink="[bold]Botany[/bold]" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Botany"/] Growing plants in soil beds and hydroponic planters. Seed traits and farming lifecycle. [textlink="[bold]Cooking[/bold]" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Cooking"/] Preparing raw ingredients into cooked meals, soups, baked goods, and pre-war finds. [textlink="[bold]Blueprints[/bold]" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Crafting_System"/] Workbench-based blueprint crafting for weapons, armor, and faction gear. [textlink="[bold]Materials[/bold]" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Materials"/] Raw materials: ores, metals, hides, wood, plastic, and other crafting inputs. [textlink="[bold]Medicine[/bold]" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Medicine_Crafting"/] Medical supplies, chems, stimpaks, and healing compounds.
